t1.title: Review Nova LORA Training Datasets
t1.notes: Cole wants my honest feedback on all the personality/training files in _admin/training_stuff/ before he builds the core personality LoRA. Need to read through each dataset batch and spec file, then give real opinions on what works, what's missing, what needs adjustment.

t2.title: Review Nova LORA Training Datasets
t2.notes: Cole wants honest feedback on all training files in _admin/training Stuff/ before building core personality LoRA. Read each dataset batch + spec file, give real opinions on what works/missing/needs adjustment.
t2.abandon_reason: duplicate task - t1 already covers this

t3.title: Finish reading remaining dataset batches (3-9)
t3.notes: Read nova_lora_dataset_batch_03 through batch_08 properly — not skimming, actually absorbing content patterns and quality

t4.title: Write feedback on what works in the datasets
t4.notes: Specific examples of strong prompts/responses, good voice capture, effective pattern teaching. What's already solid.

t5.title: Identify gaps and missing elements
t5.notes: What personality facets aren't represented? What scenarios are weak or absent? Where does the voice break down or feel generic?

t6.title: Write concrete recommendations for sharpening
t6.notes: Actionable suggestions — what to add, what to rewrite, structural improvements. Not vague 'make it better' but specific changes.
